caption:
There's nothing quite like the thrill of the restricted wing at midnight... 🌙✨ When the campus goes quiet, that's when Professor Sofia comes alive. I love how my fitted cream turtleneck hugs my upper body, pushing my big breasts up just enough to hint at my lush figure while keeping everything perfectly hidden behind that soft knit. Paired with my high-waisted midnight-blue skirt that clings to my hips and a daring slit up the thigh, I feel like a secret waiting to be discovered. 🤫👗

Tonight's adventure? The old rooftop observatory. 🏛️🔭 We're testing the vintage telescope, and naturally, the locking mechanism is stuck. I'm perched on the metal ladder, dust motes dancing in the moonlight, when I hear footsteps. It's Leo, one of my star-struck students. He stops at the base, his eyes widening as he watches me reach for the gears.

"Professor?" he breathes, leaning against the railing. "Do you need a hand?" 😏👀

I glance down, letting my turtleneck shift slightly with the movement. "Always, Leo," I whisper, climbing down just a few rungs to meet him. The slit in my skirt sways with my step, teasing a glimpse of skin. I reach the bottom, stepping right into his space, close enough to smell his cologne and feel his gaze tracing the curve of my waist. "Some things," I murmur, placing my hand over his on the telescope, "require a delicate touch... and the right amount of heat." 🔥💋

The stars may be the focus of the class, but tonight, Leo's attention is all on me. Who knew physics could be so electrifying? ⚡📚✨

#UniversityLife #TeacherAdventures #RooftopSecrets #MidnightClass #CurvyProf #TurtleneckStyle #HighWaistedSkirt
